barRaise.topFinding: Daily shipping cadence is high (24 commits in the last four days) but two structural debts are now load-bearing. The dual-path enemy architecture has diverged on a load-bearing constant (TARGET_REACQUIRE_PERIOD = 0.5 vs TARGET_REACQUIRE_SEC = 1.0), and the multimesh pool path it was built to enable is shipped-but-disabled across all eight enemy types because Godot 4 INSTANCE_CUSTOM propagation is unsolved. The project is functioning, but the v1 scale strategy is on hold and the dual-path divergence pattern that ate v0.74.22-v0.74.32 is recurring at the constants layer.
